requirement_topic.en: EMAE Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Utility Supply
requirement_topic.zh: EMAE电网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz公用电网
requirement_topic.zht: EMAE電網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz公用電網

summary.en: Sao Tome and Principe's electricity supply is operated by Empresa de Agua e Electricidade (EMAE). The practical grid baseline for EV charger planning is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, with utility acceptance required for any meaningful public, fleet, hotel, airport, port, or donor-funded charging installation. Because the national grid is small and islanded, projects should expect site-level checks for feeder capacity, transformer loading, protection coordination, metering, harmonics, voltage drop, earthing, and load management. Solar-plus-storage integration is a common donor and resilience interest and may become part of project specifications.
summary.zh: 圣多美和普林西比电力供应由Empresa de Agua e Electricidade（EMAE）运营。电动汽车充电桩规划的实务电网基线为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；任何有实际规模的公共、车队、酒店、机场、港口或援助资金充电项目均应取得公用事业接入认可。由于全国电网规模小且为海岛国电网，项目通常需要逐站核查馈线容量、变压器负荷、保护配合、计量、谐波、电压降、接地和负载管理。光伏加储能集成是援助和韧性项目常见关注点，可能写入项目规范。
summary.zht: 聖多美和普林西比電力供應由Empresa de Agua e Electricidade（EMAE）運營。電動汽車充電樁規劃的實務電網基線為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；任何有實際規模的公共、車隊、酒店、機場、港口或援助資金充電項目均應取得公用事業接入認可。由於全國電網規模小且為海島國電網，項目通常需要逐站核查饋線容量、變壓器負荷、保護配合、計量、諧波、電壓降、接地和負載管理。光伏加儲能集成是援助和韌性項目常見關注點，可能寫入項目規範。

standards_or_laws: EMAE — Empresa de Agua e Electricidade utility connection requirements
230/400 V 50 Hz IEC-style low-voltage supply baseline
IEC 61000 series — power quality and electromagnetic compatibility
Project-specific utility, donor, site-owner, or electrical-contractor specifications

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are typically designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, using GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator acceptance. Sao Tome and Principe uses the same 50 Hz frequency but a different nominal voltage of 230/400 V, so input range, protection ratings, meter compatibility, transformer loading, and thermal operation must be rechecked rather than assumed from China domestic evidence.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz设计，并依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930通信及当地电网运营商验收。圣多美和普林西比频率同为50 Hz，但标称电压为230/400 V，与中国不同，因此输入范围、保护器件额定值、计量兼容性、变压器负荷和热运行必须重新核查，不能直接沿用中国国内证据。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz設計，並依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930通訊及當地電網運營商驗收。聖多美和普林西比頻率同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，與中國不同，因此輸入範圍、保護器件額定值、計量兼容性、變壓器負荷和熱運行必須重新核查，不能直接沿用中國國內證據。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only the China 220/380 V nominal baseline. Prepare site load calculations, harmonic data, earthing and protection drawings, surge-protection design, metering interface details, and load-management settings for EMAE or project review. On a small island grid, DC fast charging may require staged capacity approval, storage buffering, or solar-plus-storage integration.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V标称基线。应为EMAE或项目审查准备站点负荷计算、谐波数据、接地和保护图纸、防雷浪涌设计、计量接口细节及负载管理设置。在小型海岛电网上，直流快充可能需要分阶段容量审批、储能缓冲或光伏加储能集成。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V標稱基線。應為EMAE或項目審查準備站點負荷計算、諧波數據、接地和保護圖紙、防雷浪湧設計、計量接口細節及負載管理設置。在小型海島電網上，直流快充可能需要分階段容量審批、儲能緩衝或光伏加儲能集成。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory — EMAE or project owner acceptance is expected for grid-connected installations; exact published EVSE-specific national rule not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance and 220/380 V design evidence are not substitutes for EMAE review or 230/400 V confirmation

source.publisher: EMAE — Empresa de Agua e Electricidade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat the voltage as different from China, even though frequency is also 50 Hz. A Sao Tome and Principe project package needs 230/400 V input confirmation, EMAE-facing grid documentation, and load-management evidence for the island grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使频率同为50 Hz，也应将该市场电压视为不同于中国。面向圣多美和普林西比的项目资料包需要230/400 V输入确认、面向EMAE的电网文件，以及适用于海岛电网的负载管理证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使頻率同為50 Hz，也應將該市場電壓視為不同於中國。面向聖多美和普林西比的項目資料包需要230/400 V輸入確認、面向EMAE的電網文件，以及適用於海島電網的負載管理證據。
